---
name: 🔧 Feature request (detailed)
about: Propose a detailed feature with technical specifications
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to be added.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What limitation does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like in detail. Include:

- How it should work
- User interface considerations
- Technical implementation thoughts
- Any edge cases to consider

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 🎨 Mockups/UI Design

If applicable, include mockups, screenshots, or diagrams to illustrate the feature.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

List the specific conditions that must be met for this feature to be considered complete:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🔧 Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🏷️ Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 📚 Dependencies

Are there any dependencies or prerequisites for this feature?

## 🤝 Contribution

Are you interested in contributing to this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to help implement this
- [ ] No, just suggesting the idea
- [ ] Maybe, depending on complexity

## 📝 Notes

Any additional notes or thoughts about this feature.
